Lady Wangof[Sun] Quan, the Lord ofWu, was fromLangye[琅邪].A
TheBook of Wustates: The father of theLadywas named[Wang] Lujiu.
TheLadywas selected to enter the harem. She became pregnant during theera and beget[Sun] He. Her favor was second toLady Bu. AfterLady Budied,[Sun] Hewas installed asHeir Apparentand[Sun] Quanwas going to install theLadyasEmpress, butPrincess Quan, who always resented theLady, slowly slandered and ruined her, and when[Sun] Quanfell bedridden, she said that the [Lady] had a joyful expression. Therefore,[Sun] Quanblamed her and was angry at her. She died from the stress.
When the son of[Sun] He,[Sun] Hao, was enthroned, he posthumously honored theLadyas theGreatand VirtuousAugust Empress[大懿皇后]. He enfeoffed her three younger brothers all as marquises.
